Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 95 

GAP_INNPP_COPAY_3M 

LABEL: Gap Copay Split Network Standard Retail — Three-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a three-month supply of the drugs on 
this tier, using an in-network non-preferred pharmacy (INNPP; also known as a standard retail 
pharmacy within a split network) during the coverage gap phase of the
